name: invoiceflow-mcp
description: AI invoice automation with PDF generation (pdf-lib), late payment risk prediction, smart reminder escalation via SendGrid, platform-agnostic payment reconciliation (CSV/webhook/manual), and cash flow analytics. 10 tools, 4 resources, 3 prompts.

tools.name: invoice_demo_seed
tools.description: Seed demo invoices + clients for evaluation without credentials

tools.name: client_manage
tools.description: Create or update client profiles with payment history

tools.name: invoice_create
tools.description: Generate invoices with line items, tax, discounts, 10 currencies; auto-sequential numbering (INV-YYYY-NNNN)

tools.name: invoice_list
tools.description: Filter by status, client, amount range, date, overdue; pagination

tools.name: invoice_send
tools.description: Email invoice PDF via SendGrid (requires SENDGRID_API_KEY)

tools.name: invoice_mark_paid
tools.description: Mark partial or full payment, updates client payment history

tools.name: invoice_remind
tools.description: Send escalating payment reminder with risk-tier messaging

tools.name: invoice_risk
tools.description: AI late-payment risk prediction (0-100) with factor breakdown

tools.name: cashflow_report
tools.description: Cash flow analytics: collection rate, 30-day projection, client breakdown

tools.name: payment_reconcile
tools.description: Match incoming payment amounts to invoices by payer email + amount
